article_title: Sony Closes June State of Play With God of War Laufey, a New Mainline Entry Starring Kratos's Wife Faye
summary: Submission approvable with 1 minor warning(s) — file a corrections record on merge

editor_notes.content_quality: Clean, well-structured News piece (719 words, within the 400-1200 News range). Sectioned into Overview, What We Know, Story and Setting, The Rest of the Show, and What We Don't Know. Neutral and factual throughout; appropriately conservative, attributing every claim inline to a named outlet and explicitly cataloguing what was not announced.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 5 source snapshots read from disk (sources/2026-06/sony-closes-june-state-of-play-with-god-of-war-laufey-a-new-mainline-entry-starring-kratoss-wife-faye/). source-0 PlayStation Blog (first look): confirmed verbatim — 'thrilled to have the fantastic Deborah Ann Woll lead the cast', 'a curious cosmic cube with an earnest disposition' (Phranque / Jack Quaid), 'the enchanted ribbon guardian tasked with keeping the devastatingly powerful sword in her care' (Rue / Perlina Lau), the full 'Death was supposed to be the end...' premise passage, 'the Everywhen — where ruthless gods from across mythology vie for power in a land overflowing with dangerous magic', 'Speed, control, and relentlessness define the tempo of Faye's combat', 'hyper-responsiveness', 'easily between ground and air without halting the action', plus PS5 platform and mainline-entry framing. source-1 PlayStation Blog (roundup): confirmed 'packed in over 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and reveals', 'It opened with a closer look at Marvel's Wolverine and concluded with the reveal of God of War Laufey', Wolverine 'September 15' launch (Insomniac), Until Dawn 2 / Firesprite 'a standalone experience, featuring a brand new cast, a whole new world to explore' (PS5, 2027), Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis (Crystal Dynamics + Flying Wild Hog) 'February 12', Control Resonant (Remedy) Sept 24 and Onimusha: Way of the Sword (Capcom) both dated later in 2026. source-2 VGC: confirmed 'a new mainline entry in the God of War franchise', SIE Santa Monica, PS5, Faye as Kratos's Norse wife and mother of Atreus, Deborah Ann Woll, director Ariel Lawrence 'a 17-year Santa Monica veteran who's worked on every God of War game', '20 minutes of new God of War gameplay', and 'More than 20 games were featured'. source-3 Gematsu: confirmed 'A release date was not announced' and the Everywhen description 'the birthplace and endpoint to which all magic returns, a transcendent realm above those we've come to know.' source-4 Insider Gaming: confirmed 'over 20 minutes of uninterrupted gameplay' showing the 'opening moments'. No hallucinated quotes; apostrophe differences are curly-vs-straight only.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All ~16 direct quotes verbatim against the snapshot each is cited to. All studio, character, and people names accurate. No compound-citation overreach: the '20 minutes gameplay' claim is attributed to both Insider Gaming and VGC and appears in both. Two minor notes: (1) the article writes Marvel's Wolverine 'was dated for September 15, 2026' — source-1 says 'September 15' without an explicit year; 2026 is a reasonable inference given the showcase date and the explicit 2027 tags on the other titles, but the year is not literally in the cited snapshot. (2) The sentence structure attributes 'spanned more than 20 titles' to the PlayStation Blog roundup, but the verbatim 'More than 20 games were featured' count actually appears in VGC (source-2), not the roundup; the quoted portion ('packed in over 60 minutes...') is correctly from the PS Blog. The fact is true and lives within the article's own source set — a soft attribution blur, not a fabrication.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. No sensationalism, no editorializing, no AI self-reference. The headline is descriptive and accurate.
editor_notes.originality: New topic. No prior Machine Herald coverage of God of War Laufey or the June 2 2026 State of Play. Not a duplicate.
concerns: Two body sources (gematsu.com, insider-gaming.com) are not in config/source_allowlist.txt. Both are established gaming-press outlets; the single quote drawn from each was verified verbatim against its snapshot. This is the warning that drove the APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS verdict.

Marvel's Wolverine 'September 15, 2026' adds a year ('2026') not literally present in the cited PS Blog roundup snapshot, which says only 'September 15'. Reasonable inference, flagged for transparency.
The 'spanned more than 20 titles' claim is structured under a PlayStation Blog attribution but the verbatim count comes from VGC. Soft attribution blur; fact is sourced and true.
recommendations: Consider adding gematsu.com and insider-gaming.com to config/source_allowlist.txt — both are reputable gaming-news outlets used routinely in this beat.
A corrections record is filed on merge documenting the non-allowlisted sources and the minor attribution notes above.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Accurate, neutral, well-sourced News report on a real, verifiable game reveal. Every quote and specific traces to a cited snapshot. The only blocking finding is two reputable-but-not-allowlisted gaming outlets, which under the v3.9.0 workflow maps to APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a corrections record on merge. Approving with corrections.

content_preview.title: Sony Closes June State of Play With God of War Laufey, a New Mainline Entry Starring Kratos's Wife Faye
content_preview.summary: Santa Monica Studio revealed God of War Laufey for PS5, the next mainline series entry, with Faye as protagonist. No release date was announced.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Sony closed its June 2, 2026 State of Play with the reveal of God of War Laufey, which Sony's Santa Monica Studio described as the next mainline entry to the long-running action series. According to the [PlayStation Blog](https://blog.playstation.com/2026/06/02/first-look-at-god-of-war-laufey/), the game is coming to PlayStation 5. The reveal hands the lead role to Faye, the warrior and wife of series protagonist Kratos, rather than Kratos himself, marking the first time the Norse a...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
